name: todoo
description: Local-first todo app with a terminal CLI, kanban board, calendar, and focus mode

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @todoo/server" "npm run dev -w @todoo/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @todoo/server && npm run test -w @todoo/cli && npm run test -w @todoo/web
